subject: Black Friday Deal: Starting NOW
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
Get 30% off the Official Store for Trump Gear |
[](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/ecgba1-bQEYFmCFeWgaBHHnDRMN6aaaaCOO~BMDQT17a?o=7@y6vBx&k=Xvqofrcy0B_asUof.iis&f=h&r=&x=v7w~vA4hfgWq4lloXgsEXp4pZi4z4z4nZEYEv&z4z)

Friend,

President-elect Trump loves a great deal.

And in honor of Black Friday, Mr. Trump is extending a **30%-OFF DEAL** at the Official Store for Trump Gear.

Use Coupon Code: BLACKFRIDAY to get 30% OFF your favorite items at the Official Store for Trump Gear.
[](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/ecgba1-bQEYFmCFeWgaBHHnDRMN6aaaaCOO~BMDQT17a?o=7@y6vBx&k=Xvqofrcy0B_asUof.iis&f=i&r=&x=v7w~vA4hfgWq4lloXgsEXp4pZi4z4z4nZEYEv&z4z)

Thanks,

Alex
Trump Store Manager

****[SHOP NOW](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/ecgba1-bQEYFmCFeWgaBHHnDRMN6aaaaCOO~BMDQT17a?o=7@y6vBx&k=Xvqofrcy0B_asUof.iis&f=j&r=&x=v7w~vA4hfgWq4lloXgsEXp4pZi4z4z4nZEYEv&z4z)****

Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.
---
Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J. Trump for President, Inc. and the Republican National Committee.
---
[Unsubscribe](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/edgba1-bQEYFmCFeWgaBHHnDRMN6aaaaCOO~BMDQT17a?o=7@y6vBx&k=Xvqofrcy0B_asUof.iis&f=l&r=) Or unsubscribe by [email](mailto:unsubscribe@gop.com?Subject=Unsubscribe%20dpwillis67@gmail.com)
---

# EMILY's List is a community of over three million members that helps elect pro-choice Democratic women to office.

name: catherine@dscc.org
subject: SALE: a tote-ally awesome gift
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Announcing a special Black Friday discount on our "Thanks Obama" tote bag. Take advantage of our offer and get a friend (or yourself!) checked off the shopping list... [](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dscc-tote-order?refcode=DPE-20161125-Catherine_DS-ProsHV&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,29,50,100,150,250&amount=29")
---
We're grateful for you this Thanksgiving, Friend.

And while Election Day didn't turn out how we hoped it would, there's still so much to be thankful for -- from healthcare reform and progress on climate change to cutting unemployment in half and ensuring marriage equality is the law of the land.

So we've got the perfect way for you to celebrate all that progress: [**A special Black Friday discount on our "Thanks Obama" tote bag! Pitch in $29 or more today and we'll send you one >>**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dscc-tote-order?refcode=DPE-20161125-Catherine_DS-ProsHV&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,29,50,100,150,250&amount=29")

| [****](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dscc-tote-order?refcode=DPE-20161125-Catherine_DS-ProsHV&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,29,50,100,150,250&amount=29")
---
Show your Democratic pride by making today's deal count -- and get a friend (or yourself!) checked off the holiday shopping list while you're at it.

[**But don 't wait, Friend -- only a limited number of totes remain! Contribute $29 or more to get your official "Thanks Obama" tote (free shipping included!)**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dscc-tote-order?refcode=DPE-20161125-Catherine_DS-ProsHV&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,29,50,100,150,250&amount=29")

Wishing you a wonderful Thanksgiving weekend,

Catherine Algeri
Director of Marketing, DSCC

A quick note on donations, Friend:

We're hard at work readying resources for the fight ahead -- and with 99% of our contributions coming from grassroots Democrats giving under $200, your support could not be more important to our efforts.

Please consider a contribution of any amount today. We can elect a Senate that will protect our values from right-wing extremists, but only if supporters like you have our back.

[**Contribute**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-20161125-Catherine_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&amounts=200,150,75,50,25&amount=25&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=a")

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ee60/2b07114c/437c9a39/7376c791/3783312578/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ee60/2b07114c/437c9a39/7376c790/3783312578/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ee60/2b07114c/437c9a39/7376c793/3783312578/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.
---
